description_long: This is a modern single-story bungalow with a flat roof and a minimalist architectural style. The structure features a combination of white and gray exterior walls, large windows, and an open layout with visible interior spaces. The front yard is landscaped with several palm trees, deciduous trees, and a decorative fence, while the backyard includes a swing set and outdoor seating area. The bungalow has a prominent entryway with steps leading up to the main door, and a carport or covered area adjacent to the entrance. The windows are arranged asymmetrically, providing ample natural light to the interior. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and integration with the surrounding greenery.
description: A modern, flat-roofed single-story bungalow with white and gray walls, large windows, landscaped yard, and outdoor living spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, steps, carport, decorative fence, and landscaped yard with palm trees.
description_view_1: Side-rear view highlighting the backyard swing set, outdoor seating, and asymmetrical window placement.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the flat roof, back windows, and additional trees in the yard.
description_view_3: Side view with a clear look at the side yard, palm trees, and the boundary fence.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and front windows
